notes: Page routes are registered through the application factory without coupling feature code into app/__init__.py.
Templates are split into app shell, page templates and reusable Jinja component primitives.
No legacy web/app.py structure or old repository code was copied.
No tenant data access or mutation is introduced in this placeholder shell.
Login placeholder action is disabled until V2-02 implements account authentication, preventing a misleading unauthenticated POST surface.
Existing security headers, request id middleware and sanitized error handling remain covered by full pytest gates.
Signal Workspace layout is used for login and workbench pages.
Core shell includes skip link, semantic main landmark, primary navigation and component states for loading, empty and error.
Desktop and mobile Playwright screenshots passed with no console errors, no horizontal overflow and reduced-motion enabled.
Focusable controls meet 40px target checks; disabled placeholder action has a visible disabled state.
